response.justification: Exceeds the 15-year engineering requirement with proven full-stack and infrastructure expertise, but lacks the demonstrated AI/ML specialization critical for a Principal Engineer role focused on AI strategy. Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (2+ months) is promising but insufficient to validate the expertise level required for director-level advisory work on cutting-edge AI technologies.
strengths: 20 years of software engineering across diverse domains (web, mobile, infrastructure, embedded systems)
Proven leadership through founding GISCollective and organizing technical education initiatives
Recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling at re:cinq
concerns: No demonstrated expertise in machine learning, deep learning, or AI-powered product development
Missing preferred master's degree or PhD in AI-related field
Limited evidence of strategic advisory work or director-level organizational influence
